lane.title: 09 POS Write
lane.last_task: Count missing Captain POS sequences after test order
lane.last_summary: After user placed a live Captain water test order paid by UPI, read-only HE Odoo check shows it saved as pos.order id 8052, reference 2670-6-000006, total ₹20.01, table First Floor Dine-In 4, pricelist 40. Backend sequence group 2670-6 now has 000001, 000002, 000003, 000006 with missing references 000004 and 000005. Therefore two Captain local POS sequence slots were consumed but not recorded in backend pos.order/payment/KDS. At least one is the photographed ₹746.35 failed order; the second may be either another real missed bill or a duplicate failed re-entry attempt for the same bill, requiring staff/UPI/KDS/table confirmation.
lane.next_action: Ask staff to reconcile exactly two missing Captain sequence slots: identify what orders 2670-6-000004 and 2670-6-000005 corresponded to after 23:20 IST, using memory, UPI history, table served, and kitchen/KDS. Do not clear remaining Captain site data until reconciliation is complete.
lane.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation by Codex. User-created live test order 2670-6-000006 confirmed backend sync recovered.

recent_events.task: Deep debug Captain-only POS session-expired outage
recent_events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo audit confirmed issue is Captain-only, not all POS and not server-wide. Cash Counter and Ground Floor continued creating pos.order/pos.payment and KDS prep records after Captain stopped. Captain config 6/session 269 is still opened and correctly configured with default pricelist 40 and available [40,45]; V2 orders were successfully recorded after the pricelist switch (e.g. Captain paid orders 7994/8001/8003 on pricelist 45), proving deployment did not break config 6. After Captain latest paid order 7994 at 2026-05-24 17:50:33 UTC (23:20 IST), there are no Captain pos.order, pos.payment, or prep/KDS records for the repeated failed attempts. Repeated same error means staff kept re-entering inside the same stale/expired Captain browser auth session; frontend can render POS from local browser state, but backend rejects validation with Session expired.
recent_events.next_action: Recover Captain by preserving tablet local POS data first: do not clear site data initially; login fresh to test.hamzahotel.com in same Chrome/profile, return/refresh Captain POS and sync/recover pending orders. If still blocked, open Captain POS config 6 on a different fresh browser/device for live service and quarantine the stale tablet until unsynced orders are reconciled/cancelled to avoid duplicate later sync.
recent_events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only pos.order/pos.payment/pos.session/pos.prep audit only.

recent_events.task: Audit whether Captain POS session-expired order was recorded
recent_events.summary: Ran read-only HE Odoo JSON-RPC audits on test.hamzahotel.com for tablet photos at 2026-05-25 02:05-02:09 IST. Config 6 is HE - Captain, current session 269 opened, default pricelist 40, available [40,45], payment methods [19,52,57,58]. No pos.order found for exact total ₹746.35 in 2026-05-24 19:45-21:15 UTC, no photo-like order lines, no pos.payment around ₹746.35, and recent Captain backend orders stop at 2026-05-24 17:50:33 UTC (23:20 IST). Conclusion: suspected order was not recorded as a backend POS sale/payment; it likely remained only in the tablet browser because payment validation failed after Odoo web session expiry.
recent_events.next_action: Recover/recreate from the tablet order screen if still visible; hard refresh/reopen Captain POS/login, then validate again. If UPI was already collected externally, enter the recovered/recreated order with HE UPI and note the incident; do not assume backend sale exists.
recent_events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only pos.order/pos.payment/pos.session audit only.

recent_events.task: Diagnose Captain POS session expired tablet error
recent_events.summary: Analyzed tablet photos from HE Captain POS after V2 pricelist switch. The visible Chicken Kabab Half price ₹198.60 matches the expected V2 canary, so pricing/pricelist deployment is behaving. The failure shown is Odoo Server Error: Session expired during payment validation, which points to browser/Odoo auth/session expiry or stale POS tab, not the last pricelist/config deployment. No Odoo mutation performed.
recent_events.next_action: Staff should press OK, refresh/reopen Captain POS, recover the draft order from table/orders if present, then validate again. If repeated, run read-only live session/payment audit before any write.
recent_events.mutation_status: No mutation. Read-only image-based diagnosis only; last Odoo mutation remains Captain config 6 [40,45] and pricelist 45 from 2026-05-24.

recent_events.task: HE Captain POS 10% offer V2 fix
recent_events.summary: Diagnosed Captain POS offer bug on test.hamzahotel.com: old offer 44 chained through Captain base pricelist 40 and dropped portion attribute extras, causing apparent 45-55% discounts. Created pricelist 45 HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 with 168 non-chained rules, switched only Captain config 6 from [40,44] to [40,45], verified Cash [41,42] and Ground [41,43] unchanged, and post-switch exhaustive variant audit passed 252 cases with 0 anomalies.
recent_events.next_action: Staff should reload Captain POS and select HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 for new Captain offer orders; verify tablet canaries Chicken Kabab Half about ₹198.60, Chicken Kabab Full about ₹400.30, Irani Chicken Full about ₹522.34. Rollback if needed: restore Captain config 6 available pricelists to [40,44].
recent_events.mutation_status: Odoo/POS production mutation completed on HE test.hamzahotel.com: created detached pricelist 45 + 168 rules, then updated only pos.config 6 available_pricelist_ids to [40,45]. No product/tax/category/KDS/session/Cash/Ground writes. Backups: /private/tmp/he_captain_offer_v2_write_backup_20260524.json and /private/tmp/he_captain_v2_live_switch_backup_20260524.json.
